home.title: Stella Nova — 27 m classic motor yacht for sale | Saltsjöbaden
home.description: Stella Nova — a classic 27-metre motor yacht from 1971, built for Count Lennart Bernadotte and fully refitted 2003–2006. A true gentleman's yacht. For sale.

contact.title: Contact — Stella Nova | Register interest
